objective: Audit AIMM-GT public paper/code surfaces for attachable MainRegimeV2 parent-root labels or direct Manipulation rows without reusing OHLCV/proxy outputs.

candidate_source.observed_shape: Paper-level social-media-influenced stock manipulation benchmark: 33 labeled ticker-days across eight equities, 3 positive manipulation events and 30 controls, synthetic social features due to Reddit API limits, real Yahoo Finance OHLCV, released schema/dashboard/code claim but no row-level CSV/parquet URL located in this bounded public audit.
candidate_source.public_code_status: no_public_code_link_found_in_catalyzex_page; arXiv exposes paper/PDF/TeX/source links but no direct row-level dataset URL in the abstract page

board_contract.required_parent_root_source: independent exact provider or exact underlying Bull/Bear/Sideways/Crisis label windows by provider/instrument/timeframe/root
board_contract.required_direct_manipulation_source: timestamped direct event/order-flow/order-lifecycle/social/on-chain positives with same-asset/venue negative controls and enough chronological calibration/test support for unchanged 95%-99% gates
forbidden_sources: synthetic social features used as direct evidence
small positive support below gate minimum

assessment.parent_root_reason: AIMM-GT is a daily manipulation benchmark over equities, not Bull/Bear/Sideways/Crisis source-label windows for the missing provider/instrument/timeframe matrix.
assessment.direct_manipulation_reason: Even if treated as social-media Manipulation provenance, the public paper-level shape has only 3 positive events, uses synthetic social features, and this audit did not locate row-level positive/negative files. It cannot satisfy the Board A unchanged support and chronological 95% gate.
assessment.candidate_value: Keep as watchlist/provenance only; useful if the author releases real row-level AIMM-GT data with timestamps, tickers, source labels, positive/control flag, and non-synthetic direct social evidence.

next_action: Do not spend another loop on AIMM-GT unless a row-level data/code release is located; continue exact MainRegimeV2 label-window acquisition or direct Manipulation sources with materialized positives and same-asset/venue negatives.
